mapper.insert: insert into note ( user_id, content, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{userId}, #{content}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: select id, user_id, content, created_at, updated_at from note where user_id = #{userId} order by id desc
select id, user_id, content, created_at, updated_at from note where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId}
